title: dionysia janthina
intro: Dionysia janthina, also known as the snow-white dionysia, is a flowering plant species in the gentian family. It is native to the mountainous regions of Iran and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant's roots and leaves are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Dionysia janthina include infusion of the roots and leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
